Jeremy Bowen: Trump is waging war based on instinct and it isn't workingOne month into the conflict in Iran, Trump's gut-instinct approach is not proving effective, writes the BBC's international editor. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c5y969pnxgvo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c5y969pnxgvo#0 Sun, 29 Mar 2026 00:02:46 GMT

Israeli police block Latin Patriarch from Palm Sunday mass in JerusalemThe move drew criticism from the church, global leaders and the US ambassador. Israel's PM said it was a safety measure following recent Iranian strikes. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg0128z41eo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg0128z41eo#0 Sun, 29 Mar 2026 21:39:08 GMT
